news.t: Trade Energy Stocks With 3 Times Leverage With MicroSectors(TM) Energy ETNs

holdings.infoBox: WTIU is an equity ETF with a total of 12 individual holdings. The top holdings are Chevron stock at 15.35%, Exxon Mobil at 14.45%, ConocoPhillips at 11.65%, Occidental Petroleum at 9.41%, and Valero Energy at 8.94%.

overview.description: The MicroSectors Energy 3X Leveraged ETNs (WTIU) is an exchange-traded note that is based on the Solactive MicroSectors Energy index. The fund is an exchange-traded note that tracks 3x the daily price movements of an index of US-listed energy and oil companies, selected and weighted by liquidity. WTIU was launched on Feb 15, 2023 and is issued by REX Microsectors.
